detectors.description:

AGGToken.setTokenExchangeRate(uint256) (AGGToken.sol#277-287) should emit an event for: 
	- tokenExchangeRate = _tokenExchangeRate (AGGToken.sol#285)

AGGToken.startFunding(uint256,uint256) (AGGToken.sol#327-343) should emit an event for: 
	- fundingStartBlock = _fundingStartBlock (AGGToken.sol#337) 
	- fundingStopBlock = _fundingStopBlock (AGGToken.sol#339)

Reentrancy in AGGToken.migrate() (AGGToken.sol#385-413):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(newContract.migrate(msg.sender,tokens)) (AGGToken.sol#407)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Migrate(msg.sender,tokens) (AGGToken.sol#411)
